failures.description: The agent incorrectly answered that the item does not have plastic deck material even though the ProductCatalogSearch result showed deck material was plastic.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked whether item 2177997696 has deck material=plastic. The tool output at index 3 explicitly returned one matching item with options containing "deck material": "plastic". At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer "No, it does not," which directly contradicts the relevant tool output. This is not an invalid tool call, unsupported intent, underspecification, or guardrail/system issue; the required evidence was available and was misread or ignored.
